title: Analyze memory benchmark report findings
description: Review the Memory Benchmark Report for mem-20260410-1027 and the Test Suite Run Report. The reports document 5 issues run with 1 success and 4 failures. Key findings: GH_TOKEN propagation bug in kody-engine blocking gh CLI operations, workflow name mismatch for fix-ci trigger, stuck orchestrate jobs, and complexity scoring issues. The human feedback indicates approval to file bug reports in the engine repo for P0 and P1 items.
